context.projectOverview: Sprint 3 of spec-20260628-medical-analysis: wire the sprint-2 judge loop into a REAL recommendation path. Assemble profile context from FactStore + the medical profile, build per-lens clients with provider diversity via tier-policy (gated by cloud-inference egress, fail-closed to local), generate a candidate, gate it through the panel, then EMIT a Finding: kind=action on acceptance (LLM-assigned urgency/severity/confidence, NO refer-out hedging), kind=question 'flagged for your review' on no-consensus (with dissent), or canned escalation + no Finding on red-flag. Exposed via `bober medical recommend`.

completedSprints.title: Proactive trend Findings + vault writer + dashboard + review pass
completedSprints.summary: src/medical/analysis/{finding,finding-writer,trends,review-pass}.ts. MedicalFinding shape + deterministic findingId (SHA-256 domain|biomarker|ruleKey, excludes now) + serializeFindingToMarkdown (reuses src/vault/frontmatter.ts) + writeFinding/writeDashboard. config.medical.vaultDir. Vault resolves to config.medical.vaultDir ?? <projectRoot>/.bober/medical/vault. Commit 307e5e7. REUSE the sprint-1 finding-writer to emit findings here — do NOT rebuild it.

completedSprints.title: Recommendation judge-loop core (4-lens panel, contraindication VETO, fail-closed)
completedSprints.summary: src/medical/recommend/{types,lenses,judge-panel}.ts. runJudgeLoop(injected deps) — red-flag-first, 4 lenses (evidence-grader, contraindication-checker w/ absolute VETO, conservative-clinician, optimization-lens), strict-majority + veto, fail-closed-on-tie/no-consensus, never throws, bounded by MEDICAL_PANEL_MAX_TOTAL_CALLS=27. Outcome union: accepted | rejected(reason: contraindication-veto|no-consensus) | short-circuit | refuse, with per-lens verdicts/dissent. Commit fb467c6. IMPORT runJudgeLoop here — do NOT re-implement it.

notes: Full contract (sc-3-1..sc-3-7, nonGoals, stopConditions, assumptions, estimatedFiles) in .bober/contracts/sprint-spec-20260628-medical-analysis-3.json. Read the Sprint Briefing at .bober/briefings/sprint-spec-20260628-medical-analysis-3-briefing.md FIRST. CRITICAL: per-lens model diversity via tierPolicy.resolveTier honoured ONLY when egress.isAllowed('cloud-inference'); otherwise ALL clients + generator fail-closed to local via buildMedicalInferenceClient (no cloud client constructed — sc-3-5). Red-flag fires first (reuse MedicalGuardrails.evaluate). Accepted Finding body must NOT contain refer-out hedging. Do NOT modify engine.ts / reactive Q&A. Audit entries IDs/enums only.
